ModMetaData.name: BioSynthetic: VRE Sanguophage Reimagined
ModMetaData.author: BattIeBear
ModMetaData.description:
V1.6
This mod is a reimagining of the Sanguophage's added by Vanilla Races Expanded - Sanguophage. It focuses on customization, with several options that affect the appearance of Bruxa, Ekkimian, and Strigoi, as well as the ability to disable new pawns of any type from being generated.
It also has several options related to Sanguophages as a whole, such as reducing or removing their need for food, disabling the Blood Moon event, and more! Includes additionaloptions if VRE Highmate or VRE Waster are also installed.
Found an issue? Leave a comment!
